plugins.name: wzrdx-kb
plugins.notes: KB-first doctrine. Installed and registered by `wzrdx setup`.

plugins.name: company-profile
plugins.notes: Company base context. Set via `wzrdx company set`; profile at .wzrdx/company.json (+ company.md for KB ingestion).

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.notes: The COO anchor: persistent tasks, workplace memory, dashboard, /start and /update.

plugins.name: data
plugins.notes: Analytics/KPI dashboards over operational data. Shared with marketing and rh.

plugins.name: small-business
plugins.notes: Shared with fin: ops uses /monday-brief, CRM hygiene, customer follow-ups; fin owns the money subset.
